tagline: Vertical ordered-list timeline — a rail of state markers with content.
whenToUse: Use Timeline to show an ordered sequence of events over time — order status, escrow stages, audit trails, activity history — where each step has a state (complete, current, upcoming, failed). Steps are an ordered list and every state is spelled in text, so the sequence is legible without relying on marker colour. For a live, prependable stream of heterogeneous events use Activity Feed; for a numbered wizard of steps a user walks through use a Stepper.
